steps.title: Step 1
steps.content: Items that are green AND rectangular AND metal must satisfy all three percentages in sequence: 37% of the box is green, then 37% of those are rectangular, then 42% of those are metal.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: Multiply the three fractions: 0.37 × 0.37 × 0.42 = 0.1369 × 0.42 = 0.057498 ≈ 5.75%. About 5.75% of all items are green rectangular metal.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.content: The question asks for items that are NOT green rectangular metal: 100% − 5.75% = 94.25%.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.content:
• A: 1.16% — far too small; this would be the result of additional incorrect multiplication.
  • B: 57.50% — does not match any reasonable intermediate.
  • C: 94.25% — matches 100% minus the 5.75% computed above.
  • D: 98.84% — off by an order of magnitude in the product.
C is correct.
